creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Pawel Stefaniak from comment #3)

I completely forgot about this PR. Modern fuse implementation supports configuration that does not require the patch. An example of a line for /etc/fstab:

/dev/da4s1 /mnt/ntfs fusefs  rw,noauto,mountprog=/usr/local/bin/ntfs-3g 0 0
